ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., CPU, memory, network) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., percentage, bytes) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the metric (e.g., normal, warning, critical) */,
  "container_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the container ID */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_container_id FOREIGN KEY ("container_id") REFERENCES containers ("container_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "containers" (
  "container_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each container */,
  "container_name" TEXT /* Name of the container */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application ID */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the deployment environment ID */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node ID */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the container was started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the container was stopped or terminated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the container (e.g., running, stopped, paused) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("container_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_containers_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES deployment_environments ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_containers_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_containers_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location ID */,
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operating system ID */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the node was started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the node was stopped or decommissioned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the node (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_os_id FOREIGN KEY ("os_id") REFERENCES operating_systems ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployment_environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment environment */,
  "env_name" TEXT /* Name of the deployment environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deployment environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_systems" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating system */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operating system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., High CPU usage, Low memory) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high, critical) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved, ignored) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value at which an alert should be triggered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., DevOps engineer, administrator) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team ID */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view dashboard) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard share */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the dashboard */,
  "shared_with_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with whom the dashboard is shared */,
  "share_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dashboard was shared */,
  "share_status" TEXT /* Status of the share (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "shared_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the dashboard */,
  "shared_with" INTEGER /* ID of the user with whom the dashboard is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_shares_shared_with_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "create_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dashboard was created */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the dashboard is shared */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* User IDs of the users with whom the dashboard is shared */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dashboard was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the dashboard is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
